label: Clare
detail: Johns Daughter, Tony's Wife, Mother of Oliver and Marco. Kind Caring, tendency to fuss over people. Loves wine, socialising, very chatty.  Clare and Catherine now own the property where we stay - Casa Stella. Having been gifted it from their Father - John.

label: Marco
detail: Tony and Clare's youngest son, aged 19, born March 2007. Musician and aspiring actor, creative, scatty, thinks he knows more italia than he does. Loves italian food, classical music and jazz, outgoing.

label: Tony
detail: App builder, Clares husband, father of Maro and Oliver. Active, outgoing, but also a big geeky.  Loves food, cooking, gets inspired when we come to italy.  Not great at sunbathing or staying still, mind always active, looking for things to do! Fun Loving, occaisionally moody.

label: Oliver (Olly)
detail: Eldest Son of Tony and Clare, born Sept 2005, 21 in September 2026. Quiet,thoughtful, fairly introvert.  Doesn't like music, loves climbing and outdoor activities.  Loves Computing and tech.  Joined the Navy  in 2024, currently completing his Fast Track Apprecticship for the submariners, once qualified will be a leading hand.  Very good with money, thrifty saving to buy a house.  Not great at languages, dyslexic so reading is difficult.

label: Catherine
detail: Clares older sister. Marco and Olly's auntie and Mother of Lucas and Isabelle. Fun Loving and social, a bit bossy and likes to be in control.  Currently looking for a handsome Italian Stud!

label: John
detail: John Hancock and his late wife, Josephine bought Casa Stella in 2007, and renovated it from a derelict building into a lovely holiday home on 3 levels. Casa Stella is situated in a small twon called Rochetta - Al Volturno, in Isernia, Molisse, Italy.  It is down a secluded road and quite isolated. The top level is a self contained 1 bedroom apartment with a double bedroom, bathroom and a kitchen / living room with a small balcony with an amazing view of the hills. Outside steps lead down to the "middle" which, wehn John and Josephine bought the property, was not sold to them ( the owner hated the english and refused to sell, even though  JO and John owned all the land and amenities to the building. As a result this was never renovated - it has since been purchased after th eproperty passed to the guys son, but remains unrenovated and acts as a storage flat.  Plans are in place to try and renovate it over the coming years. The middle has a nice outside patio/tarrace with an italian barbeque, a table and seating, it is also where the sunbathing takes place.  Down another flight of stairs is the "Cantina" a second self contained Onsuite Bedroom, with a fridge, Wardrobe and washing machine. This also has its ouwn ouside space / patio with table and chairs and access to the garden - the garden is a little untidy, not really used and backs onto the forest.  SOmetimes wild board enter the garden.

label: Lucas
detail: Lucas is Catherine's youngest son. He has just finished a finance degree at Leeds University, he is 21 years old, born in 2005. We are a close family and the cousins grew up together and remain close. Lucas is outgoing. Lucas is blonde, he dresses well, loves sports especially golf.  Him and his girlfriend Ellie went skiing here with TOny and Clare in January 2026 - The house is 35minutes from the Italian Ski Resort of Roccarasso . Lucas and Ellie are great skiers.

label: Ellie
detail: Ellie is Lucas's girlfriend and part of the family. She is great friends with Isabelle. She is funny sociable and hard working.

label: Isabelle
detail: Isabelle is Catherines eldest child, her daughter born in Feb 2023. She is 22 years old, just finished a degree in fashion at Liverpool University. She is outspoken, does not suffer fools gladly, speaks her mind even if it offends others.  She is very creative, funny - in a dry cutting way. Beautiful and difficult all at once. She has type 1 diabetes.  SHe loves Italy and gets nostalgic, she has tattoos about her late grandmother whom she loved dearly. She has a strong affinity with Casa Stella, and recently visited with her girlfried Mia, the first of the grandchidren to visit independently

label: Giancarlo
detail: Our neighbour. Bought the house from George and Anne - these were John's friends who bought the property first - John and Jo used to go out to visit them and ended up buying the derelict, attached neighbouring property - Casa Stella. Giancarlo is a free spirit in his 70s he is a skilled carpenter and a useful guy to know, he is helpful,  and is great friends with the FOunder of Franco Manco Pizzas. Giancarlo does work for him on his properties and also helps him run a local sicilian bee honey business and also a music studi he has built since selling Franco Manca.  Marco recently visited the music studio and plans to come back and record something there. Giancarlo grows great vegetables and sometimes gifts tehm to us

label: Olga
detail: Olga is Giancarlos wife - she I sRussian and speaks a littleenglish and italian.

label: Pepino
detail: Pepino is the locak land agent and architect.  He befriended John and Jo and helped them a lot when they butght the house hepled them navigate the sale, itallian property law, the renovation, etc.  He lives in the village with his wife Josepina.  He grew up in Chicago and speaks perfect English, so is an excellent erson to know.  Him and his wife are no long term family friends and our go to helpers whenever we visit.

label: Josepina
detail: Jospepina is Pepino's wife, she is lovely but speaks little or no English.
